title: Agent host behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: added explicit FutureTimeoutError handling in cancel_all_tasks()
timeout case downgraded to debug; non-timeout failures keep warning with traceback

risk_signals.evidence: upstream collapses timeout and generic failures into one warning line
risk_signals.impact: less precise diagnosis for cancellation timeout vs real error

decision_gate: prefer keep_local if behavior is functionally equivalent with improved timeout/error diagnostics
